title: WordPress / WooCommerce Developer & UX/UI Designer for Premium Restaurant, Catering & Events Website
desc: We are looking for an experienced WordPress / WooCommerce developer, UX/UI designer, or small development team to refine, finalize and implement a premium hospitality website for Berg Blick Restaurant, Catering & Events. The goal is to build a refined, responsive and technically maintainable WordPress website with a premium visual frontend, modular backend structure, SEO-ready architecture and a practical catering order or inquiry workflow. The first phase should remain lean, practical and operationally realistic, using third-party integrations where appropriate. The project is based on an existing Figma file that already contains the core visual direction. This file should not be redesigned from scratch. Instead, it should be carefully reviewed, completed, polished and elevated into a consistent, responsive, prototype-linked and development-ready design system. Existing Figma file: https://www.figma.com/design/2SuHjkW9ELQRAtVeYYGLvo/BERG-BLICK-RESTAURANT?node-id=3706-61106&t=DZhnMaIBjKC6tHSs-1 Project Objective The final website should feel like a premium digital hospitality experience, not like a standard restaurant website. It should combine: Restaurant presentation Catering offers and catering order/inquiry flow Event inquiries Takeaway information or ordering integration Table reservation integration Help / Contact areas SEO landing pages Newsletter / community elements Multilingual-ready content structure The website should feel: premium modern warm animated structured fluid hospitality-focused mobile-first conversion-oriented easy to manage internally Important Application Requirement Before starting implementation, the contractor must provide an initial technical analysis. This technical analysis should include: recommended WordPress setup recommended plugin stack assessment of whether the catering flow should be built as WooCommerce order flow, inquiry flow or hybrid flow assessment of required third-party integrations assessment of payment and invoice setup performance and SEO considerations risks, limitations and recommended implementation approach Applicants must also provide relevant references. Relevant references should ideally include: premium WordPress websites restaurant or hospitality websites WooCommerce order flows catering, food ordering or booking systems Figma-to-WordPress projects websites with animations, GSAP or premium scrolling effects multilingual WordPress websites projects with payment, invoice or booking integrations Applications without a short technical assessment and relevant references will not be prioritized. Project Scope The project consists of two main work packages: Design refinement Technical WordPress implementation The existing design should be refined and elevated first. Only once the design direction, responsive layouts, animations and prototype logic are approved should the development phase begin. Design Scope The design phase is a key part of the project. The objective is not only to make the current Figma file responsive, but to turn it into a polished, premium and development-ready design system. The current design should be treated as a strong draft. It already contains elements that should be preserved where they work well, especially the overall visual direction, typography, header approach, selected images, small moving image elements and the premium atmosphere already visible in parts of the file. At the same time, some sections still need refinement. Several areas feel unresolved, too static, visually inconsistent or unfinished. These sections should be reworked and brought into a more cohesive, modern, elegant and fluid design language. The design should feel like an animated, informative visual story. It should feel more alive, more premium and more contemporary. Sections should become more dynamic, with a strong sense of storytelling, layout rhythm, modern composition and subtle interaction. Design Requirements The contractor should: review the existing Figma file in detail identify which sections should remain and which need refinement improve layout rhythm and visual hierarchy create a more polished and premium overall design language complete unfinished sections and subpages refine desktop layouts refine tablet layouts rethink the mobile experience prepare a clean, app-like mobile version create a consistent component logic improve spacing, typography and readability ensure the design feels coherent across all pages prepare the final Figma file for development handoff Color System The following color palette should be applied consistently: #E7E0D2 – Bone #BAB59E – Khaki Beige #FFE4DD – Soft Blush #FF8551 – Coral Glow #FF6529 – Tiger Flame The stronger orange tones should be used selectively for CTAs, highlights and important interactive moments. They should not dominate the entire website. The design should use calm background areas, reduced color blocks and clear visual distinction between base sections, highlighted sections, buttons and interactive elements. Mobile UX The mobile version is especially important. It should not simply be a compressed desktop version. Instead, the mobile experience should feel: clearer more reduced more app-like easier to navigate faster to understand more conversion-focused It is acceptable to simplify, shorten, rearrange or omit content on mobile if this improves usability. Animation, Interaction & Prototyping Requirements Animations are an important part of the desired premium experience, but they must support the user journey and not overload the website. The design phase should include a clear animation and interaction concept. Desired animation and interaction elements: subtle scroll-based storytelling smooth section transitions elegant fade-ins image movement or parallax where appropriate hover effects for buttons, cards and navigation elements micro-interactions for CTAs animated transitions between key sections premium but lightweight motion language mobile-friendly interaction behavior The contractor should define in Figma how these interactions should work and prepare them for developer handoff. The Figma prototype should clearly communicate: main user journey navigation logic catering entry points event inquiry flow mobile menu behavior button states hover states where relevant scrolling logic section transitions interactive elements handoff notes for animations Only after the static design has been resolved in a consistent and polished way should animations, transitions and prototype links be finalized. The final Figma file must be visually consistent, content-complete, responsive across relevant screen sizes, prototype-linked and ready for implementation. Catering Workflow Requirement A key part of the project is a simplified but professional catering order or inquiry workflow. The preferred logic is inspired by online grocery ordering systems such as REWE: customers should first browse products or catering offers, select items or packages, and only later choose delivery or pickup details. The catering flow should support the following customer journey: Customer browses catering categories such as breakfast, lunch, snacks, drinks or event catering. Customer selects products, packages or inquiry options. Customer adds items to the cart or structured inquiry form. Relevant upselling options are shown, for example smoothies with breakfast or desserts with lunch. The system checks whether the minimum order value is reached. Customer selects delivery or pickup. Customer selects a delivery or pickup date. The system enforces a minimum lead time of two days. Customer enters company, contact, delivery and invoice details. Customer adds allergies, dietary requirements and special instructions. Customer submits the order or inquiry. The internal team receives a structured request or order summary. If payment is included, the customer can pay online, for example via PayPal or credit card. If invoicing is enabled, an automatic invoice should be generated and sent to the customer. Catering Business Rules The catering workflow must support: minimum lead time: 2 days in advance minimum order value: €350 delivery or pickup slot selection structured customer and company data allergy and dietary request fields optional payment by PayPal, credit card or invoice automatic invoice generation internal order or inquiry notification possibility to generate production or packing information internally The exact setup may be implemented as: direct WooCommerce order flow inquiry-based process hybrid system The chosen solution must be intuitive for the customer and operationally practical for the Berg Blick team. Recommended Technical Foundation The website should be built with a clean, maintainable and performance-conscious WordPress setup. Recommended technical stack: WordPress Custom WordPress theme based on Figma ACF Pro for modular backend content management WooCommerce for catering order functionality, if a direct order flow is implemented Fluent Forms or Gravity Forms for inquiry-based workflows Rank Math SEO for SEO structure WPML or multilingual-ready setup GSAP or custom JavaScript for animations and transitions WP Rocket or LiteSpeed Cache for performance optimization Imagify or similar for WebP / image optimization Cloudflare for CDN and security WP Mail SMTP for reliable email delivery Google Analytics 4 and Google Search Console Mollie Payments for WooCommerce for payment processing, including PayPal Germanized for WooCommerce and/or PDF Invoices & Packing Slips for German checkout compliance and automatic invoice creation Existing third-party systems may be integrated where operationally useful: Lightspeed for menu / takeaway ordering CentralPlanner or another reservation system for table reservations ActiveCampaign for newsletter and CRM workflows The setup should avoid unnecessary technical complexity in the first phase and use connected third-party systems or iframe integrations where they are operationally more practical. Recommended WooCommerce Setup for Catering If WooCommerce is used for the catering flow, the recommended plugin stack would be: WooCommerce Order Delivery Date Pro for WooCommerce WooCommerce Product Add-Ons or Product Options and Fields WooCommerce Product Bundles Cart and Checkout Upsell Checkout Field Editor for WooCommerce Mollie Payments for WooCommerce Germanized for WooCommerce PDF Invoices & Packing Slips Custom development may be required for: €350 minimum order value rule 2-day advance order validation B2B checkout fields conditional invoice payment for approved business customers internal production or packing list formatting category-based product availability, for example breakfast only in the morning Development Requirements The developer should implement: custom WordPress theme based on the approved Figma design responsive frontend for desktop, tablet and mobile reusable content modules via ACF Pro clean navigation, header and footer structure restaurant pages catering pages event pages contact/help pages SEO-friendly page structure animations and transitions catering inquiry or order flow third-party integrations where required multilingual-ready structure performance optimization analytics and tracking setup testing and launch support The backend must remain easy to manage for the internal team. Texts, images, recurring sections, catering offers, event content and SEO fields should be editable without developer support. SEO Requirements The website must be built with strong technical SEO fundamentals from the beginning. Requirements include: clean URL structure editable meta titles and descriptions Rank Math SEO setup clear heading hierarchy structured and indexable content internal linking logic fast loading times mobile optimization image optimization XML sitemap multilingual SEO readiness Google Search Console setup Google Analytics 4 setup The structure should also support future SEO landing pages for catering, events, restaurant and local search topics. Payment and Invoice Requirements The recommended payment provider is Mollie Payments for WooCommerce, because it supports relevant German and European payment methods, including PayPal, credit card and Apple Pay. The system should support: PayPal credit card Apple Pay optional Klarna optional SEPA or bank transfer invoice payment for approved B2B customers prepayment or deposit logic for larger catering orders For invoices, the recommended setup is Germanized for WooCommerce Pro and/or PDF Invoices & Packing Slips. The system should be able to: automatically generate invoices attach invoice PDFs to order emails make invoices available in the customer account include company name, invoice address, VAT, cost center and PO number where relevant generate packing slips or internal order documents support manual invoice correction if an order changes Milestone Structure The project should be delivered in structured milestones. Milestone 1 – UX/UI Design Refinement & Design Finalization This first milestone replaces a generic kickoff milestone. The first real project output should be the refined, completed and development-ready design. Scope: full review of the existing Figma file UX/UI review and design direction alignment assessment of existing sections and visual logic layout, hierarchy and spacing refinement color system implementation completion of unresolved or missing sections Help and Contact page completion responsive desktop, tablet and mobile refinement mobile-first UX improvement animation concept definition prototype linking interaction logic developer handoff preparation Figma cleanup and component organization Expected result: a refined, complete, responsive, prototype-linked and development-ready Figma file. Milestone 2 – Technical Analysis & Architecture Planning Scope: technical analysis of the required WordPress setup recommendation of plugin stack assessment of WooCommerce vs. inquiry-based catering flow definition of catering workflow logic definition of 2-day lead-time logic definition of €350 minimum order value logic definition of payment and invoice setup third-party integration planning SEO structure review backend architecture planning performance and security concept staging/project environment preparation Expected result: a clear technical implementation plan before development starts. Milestone 3 – Frontend Development & Core WordPress Structure Scope: WordPress environment setup custom theme development global frontend structure header/footer/navigation development responsive page structure reusable component system homepage implementation restaurant pages event pages catering pages SEO-focused structural setup ACF-based backend content architecture Milestone 4 – Catering Flow, Animations & Integrations Scope: simplified catering inquiry or order flow 2-day lead-time logic €350 minimum order value logic WooCommerce or form-based implementation structured request/order handling upselling logic payment integration if applicable automatic invoice setup if applicable Lightspeed integration or embedding where applicable reservation system integration GSAP/custom interaction development scroll transitions and storytelling sections responsive interaction optimization multilingual-ready structure implementation Milestone 5 – SEO, Optimization, Testing & Go-Live Scope: technical SEO setup meta structure and SEO field setup performance optimization mobile optimization final content integration QA testing across devices checkout/order testing form testing payment testing invoice testing bug fixing and refinements analytics and tracking setup deployment and launch support final backend cleanup Ideal Candidate We are looking for someone who has experience with: custom WordPress development WooCommerce setup and customization ACF Pro responsive frontend development Figma-to-WordPress implementation GSAP or premium web animations technical SEO performance optimization multilingual WordPress setups payment provider integrations German WooCommerce compliance tools structured form or order workflows hospitality, restaurant, catering or booking websites Experience with the following tools is a plus: Mollie Germanized for WooCommerce PDF Invoices & Packing Slips Order Delivery Date Pro WooCommerce Product Add-Ons WooCommerce Product Bundles Fluent Forms or Gravity Forms WPML Rank Math ActiveCampaign Lightspeed CentralPlanner Cloudflare Kinsta Expected Result The final result should be a premium, responsive and technically stable WordPress website for Berg Blick Restaurant, Catering & Events. The website should: look and feel premium follow the approved Figma design work smoothly on desktop and mobile include a simple and user-friendly catering workflow enforce a 2-day catering lead time support a €350 minimum order value integrate relevant third-party tools allow online payment where required support automatic invoice creation remain easy to edit internally support multilingual and SEO-ready growth provide a solid base for future extensions The first phase should remain lean, practical and maintainable. The priority is to create a strong hospitality platform with a polished frontend, clear user journey and reliable operational workflows.
toolsWhy: for layered/retouched assets and multi-page layout

title: Develop AR Virtual T-Shirt Try-On WordPress/WooCommerce Plugin Name (WearLens)
desc: WearLens – AR Virtual T-Shirt Try-On WordPress Plugin Development Project Overview We are looking for an experienced developer or development team to build a professional and user-friendly WordPress/WooCommerce plugin called WearLens. The goal of this plugin is to provide a real-time Augmented Reality (AR) virtual try-on experience for clothing stores, especially for T-shirts. Customers should be able to click a “View in AR” button on a product page and instantly preview the selected T-shirt design on their body in real time using their device camera, similar to modern AR filter experiences. The plugin should be modern, lightweight, responsive, optimized, and compatible with a wide range of devices and browsers. Core Features Required 1. Real-Time AR T-Shirt Try-On Customer opens a T-shirt product page A “View in AR” button appears below the product gallery When clicked: Device camera opens instantly Selected T-shirt design loads in AR mode T-shirt aligns with the customer’s chest/body area User can move naturally and preview the shirt in real time Experience should feel smooth and interactive 2. Dynamic Product Integration The plugin should automatically work with WooCommerce T-shirt products. Requirements: Selected design should display correctly in AR Product colors should reflect accurately Product variations should sync automatically Multiple designs should be supported 3. Seller/Admin Dashboard A professional admin dashboard is required where store owners can: Upload T-shirt designs Upload or manage 3D shirt models Adjust: Position Scaling Alignment Color settings AR fitting settings Configure product-specific settings Preview AR results before publishing Easily manage products Dashboard UI should be clean, modern, and beginner-friendly. 4. Device Compatibility Plugin should work smoothly on: Android devices iPhones/iPads Desktop browsers (where supported) Browser compatibility preferred: Chrome Safari Edge Firefox (if supported) Performance optimization is extremely important. The plugin should remain smooth and stable without lag or crashes. 5. WooCommerce Integration The plugin should integrate properly with WooCommerce features including: Variable products Product galleries Product variations Cart compatibility Checkout compatibility 6. UI/UX Requirements Brand Name: WearLens Theme Colors: Yellow Black Design style should feel: Premium Futuristic Clean Fashion-tech inspired Animations and transitions should feel modern and smooth. 7. Preferred Features AI body tracking Auto chest alignment Real-time resizing Multiple size previews AR screenshot feature Social sharing Analytics tracking CDN optimization Lightweight loading system One-click setup wizard 8. Technical Expectations Preferred experience with: WebAR Three.js TensorFlow.js 8thWall / MindAR / ZapWorks / WebXR WordPress Plugin Development WooCommerce APIs 3D rendering optimization Code should be: Clean Secure Scalable Well-documented 9. Deliverables Expected deliverables: Fully functional plugin Complete source code Installation support Documentation Bug fixing support Deployment assistance 10. Long-Term Opportunity Successful completion may lead to long-term collaboration for: Feature upgrades Maintenance Updates Additional AR features Requirements for Applicants Please include: Portfolio Similar AR/WebAR projects Estimated timeline Budget estimate Technologies/frameworks you plan to use Developers are free to use the technology stack or AR solution they believe is best suited for the project. Our priority is a reliable, high-quality, and optimized final product that delivers a smooth AR virtual try-on experience across devices. Thank you.

title: Garment Designer for Oversized Heavyweight Hoodies & Track Pants (500-600 GSM)
desc: We're an apparel brand launching a premium heavyweight line that sits right at the intersection of comfort wear and streetwear, and we're looking for an experienced garment/apparel designer to take our concept to production-ready tech packs. About the Project: Our aesthetic is a deliberate blend of comfort wear and streetwear - the softness, warmth, and easy-to-live-in feel of loungewear, paired with the boxy, elevated silhouettes and detailing of street style. We're building oversized, heavyweight pieces in 500-600 GSM French terry/fleece with structured drape, dropped shoulders, and a substantial hand-feel. The line includes matching hoodies and track pants designed to be worn together as a set. title: Senior React Native / Expo iOS Developer
desc: 🚀 This is an extremely unique dream job opportunity to build MIRRA.co with our team of devs. This app will change the way the world connects with people in person and online. We are not building an average app. MIRRA has one of the most advanced and visually intricate user interfaces ever built on React Native and we need someone who is genuinely elite. 🎥 WATCH THIS LOOM Description FIRST https://www.loom.com/share/7d0e20e64ab5498d99990043cdff0377 **🚨 If you don't watch the full video, your application will not be considered**. This is non-negotiable. * This is a full time role * Must have excellent English ▪️ Your Application (🔺 REQUIRED) ✅ To apply, you MUST add a Loom video covering: * Why you are the right fit, introduce yourself and your understanding of this project and show your character * Walk through a shipped iOS app, show us something you built that you are genuinely proud of and that demonstrates your eye for UI quality Also include: * Links to iOS apps you have shipped on the App Store built with React Native and Expo * Brief description of your Supabase experience (auth, RLS, realtime complexity) * Your resume or portfolio Generic proposals without these items will be ignored. No exceptions. ▪️ The Role We are building MIRRA.co, the most advanced digital identity platform ever created, launching mid-2026. The web app is production ready. We are now bringing the full platform to native iOS using React Native and Expo and we need a world class engineer to own that mobile experience end to end alongside our founding iOS engineer Phong. This is not a role for someone learning or growing into React Native Expo. We move fast, and we expect you to be fluent in the stack from day one. MIRRA's UI is not your average app. It has complex animations, glassmorphism, gesture driven interactions, custom transitions, and pixel perfect Figma to code implementation. You need to have taste. You need to care about every detail. You need to be a savage engineer that is obsessed with design and functionality. This is a long term role. We are looking for someone who is going to stay with us and grow with this product, it will be the best team/company you have ever worked for... mark my words ▪️ Tech Stack (📱 Mobile iOS) You must have deep hands-on experience with: * React Native and Expo SDK 55, this is your world, not a side skill * Expo Router, expo-dev-client, full Expo module suite * Supabase, auth flows (Apple/Google), realtime, storage, RLS queries (critical) * TanStack Query v5, React Hook Form and Zod * Tailwind CSS for React Native * React Native Reanimated, Gesture Handler, complex custom animations * React Native Keyboard Controller, i18next, Nitro Modules * TypeScript strict mode — the entire codebase is strictly typed * EAS builds, OTA updates, App Store submissions ▪️ Tech Stack (💻 Web, for context) The web app runs on Next.js 16, Supabase, TanStack Query v5, Tailwind CSS v4, and Framer Motion. You do not need to be the primary web engineer but you must be comfortable reading and understanding the codebase as mobile and web share a Turborepo monorepo with shared packages. 🚨 If you cannot work across both mobile and web you are not the right fit. ▪️ Responsibilities * Own the iOS app end to end with our founding iOS engineer, architecture, features, performance, and quality * Translate Figma designs to pixel perfect native iOS UI with no compromises * Implement complex UI, animations, gestures, bottom sheets, custom transitions, glassmorphism * Integrate deeply with Supabase, auth, realtime, storage, RLS aware queries * Maintain TypeScript strict mode discipline across the shared monorepo * Manage EAS builds, OTA updates, and App Store submissions * Hold yourself to the same standard as the design, if it does not look exactly like Figma it is not done ▪️ What We Are Looking For We are not looking for a developer who will vibe code their way through this. We are looking for someone who genuinely cares about what they build, has an exceptional eye for detail, and has already operated at this level. Our engineering team will know within the first minute of a technical conversation if you are the real deal. Do yourself a favor and only apply if you genuinely are.

title: Ecom Video Editor for Meta & TikTok Ads
desc: About Us: We are a dynamic and rapidly growing 7-figure women's jewelry brand powered by Shopify. We are passionate about great design that speaks for itself, drawing inspiration from everyday fashion and influencers, and genuinely caring about the products we create and the relationships we build. Our marketing is performance-driven, and high-converting video creative is central to our scaling strategy. The Role: We're seeking a skilled and agile E-commerce Response Video Editor (full time / 40 hours per week) who understands how to create video ads that don't just look good but convert. You will work in lockstep with our Creative Strategist, taking raw footage (UGC, potentially studio shots) and briefs to produce engaging, platform-optimized video ads primarily for Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and TikTok. Your job is to execute rapidly, iterate effectively based on performance insights (provided by the strategist), and ensure the final output is engineered for maximum engagement and conversions. Forget long-form content; this is about short, punchy, direct-response video. IMPORTANT: This is not a role for someone juggling multiple jobs, working for or running a freelancing agency, or managing several clients at once. We are looking for a dedicated full-time video editor who will work exclusively with us and be fully committed to our brand, team, and creative output. Key Responsibilities: • Edit High-Performing Video Ads: Transform raw footage and strategist briefs into compelling video ads optimized for Meta and TikTok feeds/stories/reels. • Rapid Iteration: Quickly execute multiple variations of winning ad concepts provided by the Creative Strategist (testing different hooks, visuals, text overlays, CTAs, music). Understand that iteration based on data is key. • Platform Optimization: Expertly edit for platform best practices – strong hooks within the first 3 seconds, fast pacing, engaging captions/text overlays, appropriate aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 4:5), safe zones, and effective sound design. • Integrate Copy & CTAs: Seamlessly weave in primary text concepts, headlines, and clear calls-to-action as guided by the strategist. • Collaborate Closely: Maintain clear, fast communication (Slack, etc.) with the Creative Strategist to receive feedback, discuss edits, and ensure alignment with performance goals. • Asset Management: Organize and manage video files and project assets efficiently. • Meet Deadlines: Deliver high-quality edits reliably and on schedule in a fast-paced environment. Who We're Looking For: • Proven Social Ad Editing Experience: Minimum 2+ experience specifically editing short-form video advertisements for performance marketing campaigns on Meta & TikTok. A portfolio showcasing direct-response style video ads is required. • Technical Proficiency: Highly skilled in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut is a major plus). Proficiency in basic motion graphics (e.g., After Effects for text overlays) is desirable. • Platform Native: Deep understanding of what works visually on TikTok and Meta feeds/stories/reels – you know the trends, the hooks, the pacing, the sounds that grab attention immediately. • Performance-Oriented Mindset: You understand the goal is conversion, not just aesthetics. You are receptive to feedback driven by ad metrics and can adapt edits accordingly. (Links to Strategist's "Data Mastery," "Creativity That Converts"). • Speed and Agility: Ability to work quickly, execute variations efficiently, and adapt to changing requirements without sacrificing quality. (Links to Strategist's "Adaptability & Agility"). • Collaborative Spirit: Excellent communication skills and ability to work effectively and receive direction from a Creative Strategist. (Links to Strategist's "Collaboration is Key," "Clear Communication"). • Strong Work Ethic & Accountability: Reliable, proactive, meets deadlines, and takes ownership of edit quality – no babysitting needed. (Links to Strategist's "Work Ethic"). • Detail-Oriented: Ensures brand consistency, correct aspect ratios, and error-free text/graphics. Nothing sloppy makes the cut. • Basic understanding of direct response marketing principles. • Experience editing UGC content. Compensation: $2,000 monthly base salary, with the opportunity to earn monthly performance-based bonuses tied to creative contributions. Total monthly compensation can reach up to $4,000 based on performance. How to Apply: In your proposal, you MUST include (give as much detail as possible): 1. Provide your Resume/CV and link to your portfolio showcasing ECOM VIDEO ADS for Meta/TikTok.Other type of ads will not be looked at or considered. 2. Briefly describe your process for editing a typical 15-45 sec. video ad. 3. How do you handle feedback and rapid iteration requests from creative strategists? 4. List your primary editing software and mention your experience with CapCut. 5. What AI tools or software have you used to create video ads? Provide as much detail as possible and share any previous AI work if any.

title: Finish Writing/Editing a book then Kindle Publish
desc: This is the feedback I have received that is needed for the book. Specific areas to strengthen: • The intro / opening. o Consider the "Why What Who How Now" framework, where the CERI process is the HOW (the NOW is the CTA). o More building out of the WHY up front -- why this matters to the reader, to their family, to their community, to the world) o I'd love to see the WHAT (AKA: PROBLEM / SOLUTION) be fleshed out more -- the symptoms and struggles this addresses. And presenting the solution as a clear directive: "Make friends with money" or something like that (maybe that's not it, but some sort of very simple "command" statement that encapsulates your "big sexy idea." o How you came to know the solution (WHO) -- your origin story which can be woven throughout the book, but at least share your credibility in the beginning somewhere -- AKA: how did you come to know this? Not a resume, but a reason to trust your advice. How many clients have you worked with? What do you actually do with them? What have you witnessed, over and over, that made you realize this was a pattern worth writing about? And YOUR story -- right now you have stories that illustrate the point but not an ORIGIN story. You have stories that illustrate the concept beautifully. But I find myself wondering: how did Joan come to know this? What happened in your own life or work that made you see the vision/money confusion so clearly? That will create connection with the reader. I think the answer might already be in the book. The capital gains story is close. • Chapters -- I think the internal chapters would also benefit from following a modified "Why / What / Who / How / Now" process so that each chapter has it's own Problem -- Solution. I am more a "talker" than writer. To work with me it would help to have you "interview" me about the parts that need to be written. You then write them and I review them.

title: Luxury Packaging Designer — Hyperrealistic Beauty Subscription Box
desc: We're creating a beauty subscription box that features multiple brands in every delivery, and we're looking for a designer to create the packaging ... the physical box, structure, materials, and finishes ... at a true luxury level. The gold standard we keep coming back to is Gucci: clean, confident, impeccably finished, and luxurious without trying too hard. That's the feeling we want to capture and make our own. For clarity, this is a packaging design project. We're hiring someone to design a beautiful, premium box — its form, its structure, its materials, and how it presents multiple beauty products inside. A note on who we're looking for: We're specifically looking for designers with beauty packaging experience. Beauty is its own world — the aesthetics, the materials, the way products are showcased — and we've found it really does take someone who has worked in this space to get it right. If your background is in beauty or cosmetics packaging, we'd love to hear from you. If it isn't, this likely isn't the right fit, and that's okay. The packaging we're after We want a box that feels unmistakably luxury from the outside in. Here's what matters most to us: -A refined, premium exterior. A box that signals luxury before it's even opened — beautiful proportions, clean lines, impeccable finish. -Elevated materials and finishes. Smooth, soft, modern luxury. (A note on taste: we're not fans of embossing or hot foil stamping, so please lean away from that look.) -Thoughtful interior structure. Inserts and dividers that hold each brand's product securely and present them like they matter — organized, elegant, with room to breathe rather than crowded. -Considered details. A satisfying closure, a ribbon pull, a branded seal, a thoughtful card — small touches that make the whole thing feel intentional and polished. -A premium opening. The box should open in a way that feels special — a clean, satisfying reveal of the products inside. Throughout, we're drawn to restraint: beautiful materials and elegant finishes over clutter or heavy ornamentation. What you'll be designing toward: We'll provide our vision and reference imagery for the look and feel. The designer we award the project will take that direction and develop an original design — so we want someone who can elevate inspiration into something distinctly their own. You have real creative latitude here; we're giving you the feeling, not a rulebook. Deliverables — a collaborative, two-phase process: The project moves in two phases: Phase 1 — Concepts. At least three distinct design directions (storyboards, mockups, concept boards — whatever suits your process), each a different take on the packaging. We'd love a short walkthrough of your thinking with each one: the choices behind the structure, the materials and finishes, how the products are arranged inside, the closure and opening, and any special touches you'd build in (a magnetic close, a ribbon pull, a hidden compartment, an interior video screen, and so on). We'll review together, share feedback, and approve a direction to take forward. Phase 2 — Final renders. Once we've aligned on a concept, you'll produce the finished hyperrealistic imagery: -3 hyperrealistic images of the box closed -3 hyperrealistic images of the box open, showing the interior structure and how the multi-brand products are presented inside These final images should read as real product photography — photorealistic renders, not flat mockups. To apply, please include: Examples of beauty packaging you've designed (portfolio, past concepts, or relevant work). Please note, food & beverage, apparel, etc will not be considered samples will not be considered. If this sounds like you, we'd love to see your work.

title: Mandarin-English Technical Interpreter for Product Development Calls
desc: Job Title: Mandarin-English Technical Interpreter for Product Development Calls Job Description: We’re looking for a Mandarin-English technical interpreter to join live product development calls with our engineering team in China. This role is specifically for technical communication during product development, not general translation. We need someone who can help our English-speaking team communicate clearly with Chinese engineers and manufacturers, especially around beauty / personal care devices such as LED face masks, IPL devices, RF devices, and similar at-home electronic beauty devices. The ideal person has experience interpreting in technical, engineering, manufacturing, or product development settings and is comfortable asking clarifying questions in real time when something is unclear. You will help interpret discussions related to: -Product specifications -Engineering updates -Component changes -Firmware or device behavior -Testing requirements -Quality control issues -Manufacturing constraints -Safety and usage details -Packaging, manuals, and labeling -Product development feedback between teams We need someone who can do more than translate sentence by sentence. You should be able to understand the technical context, preserve accuracy, flag ambiguity, and help both sides confirm that they are aligned before moving on. Ideal experience: *Fluent in Mandarin and English *Experience interpreting live technical or engineering calls *Experience with manufacturers, product development, consumer electronics, beauty devices, personal care devices, or medical-adjacent devices *Comfortable with technical terminology related to devices, hardware, testing, quality, manufacturing, and product specs *Able to interpret clearly and neutrally in both directions *Willing to pause the conversation when clarification is needed Familiarity with LED, IPL, RF, EMS, microcurrent, skincare, or similar device categories is a strong plus *Available for calls across U.S. and China time zones Examples of calls we may need support on: -Reviewing engineering feedback from the factory -Discussing product design or functionality changes -Clarifying test results or QC issues -Aligning on device performance, safety, and usability requirements -Talking through packaging, manuals, labeling, or warnings -Confirming next steps, ownership, and timelines after technical discussions Please include a brief summary of your live interpretation experience, especially any work involving engineering teams, manufacturers, consumer electronics, beauty devices, or medical/personal care devices. To apply, please answer: 1. Have you interpreted live calls between English-speaking teams and Chinese engineering or manufacturing teams? 2. What types of technical products or devices have you worked with? 3. Are you comfortable interrupting or pausing a call to clarify technical details? 4. What time zones are you available for? 5. What is your hourly rate for live call interpretation?

title: Salesforce Solution Architect — Multi-Cloud Implementation & Integration
desc: We are seeking an experienced Salesforce Solution Architect to join our team on a contract basis. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience designing and implementing enterprise-scale Salesforce solutions across multiple Salesforce Clouds while working closely with stakeholders, clients, and technical teams. About us: We're a US-based mid-market professional services firm running Salesforce as our core internal system. We've outgrown the configuration-only setup and need an architect who can own the next stage of our Salesforce buildout — multi-cloud orchestration, custom Apex + LWC work, and clean integration with our adjacent systems. Scope: - Design and architect scalable Salesforce solutions aligned with business requirements across Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Experience Cloud - Lead end-to-end Salesforce implementation projects, including solution design, custom development, integration, and deployment - Build out custom Apex classes, triggers, and LWC components for use cases that go beyond out-of-the-box config - Architect integration patterns between Salesforce and our adjacent systems (billing, finance, marketing) via REST API, Platform Events, and webhook patterns - Set up Salesforce CPQ for our quoting and renewals workflow - Define governance, security, and deployment patterns including Change Sets, Metadata API, and CI/CD - Work with our existing Salesforce admin to mentor on architect-level decisions Required experience: - 7+ years senior Salesforce development with deep Apex and Lightning Web Components experience - Demonstrated work as a Salesforce Solution Architect or Senior Salesforce Architect on enterprise orgs - Strong API Integration background — REST API, SOAP API, Bulk API, Composite API patterns - Hands-on with Salesforce CPQ, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Experience Cloud - Production deployment experience: Change Sets, Metadata API, sandbox-to-prod CI/CD - Cloud Computing fundamentals and software architecture maturity - US-based or able to work EST/CST hours for daily standup Strong plus: - Salesforce Certified Platform Developer I or II - Salesforce Certified Application Architect or System Architect - AppExchange managed package or ISV experience - Marketing Cloud or Pardot/MCAE experience for cross-cloud work - ITIL or change management background - Experience with NetSuite, HubSpot, or other enterprise system integrations We are NOT looking for: - Junior/intermediate Salesforce developers (this is an architect-level engagement) - Pure admin / clicks-not-code consultants (we need someone who can also write Apex + LWC) - Generalist "Salesforce consultants" without specific architect-level project examples In your proposal, please answer: 1. Walk us through one real enterprise Salesforce architecture project you've led. What clouds were involved, what custom Apex / LWC work, and how did you handle the integration boundary with adjacent systems? 2. Have you implemented Salesforce CPQ for quoting / renewals? Briefly describe the org size and complexity. 3. What's your Salesforce certification stack today? 4. Have you ever shipped an AppExchange managed package or worked on one as a core contributor? 5. Are you US-based? What hours do you work? Budget is $60-120/hr depending on certification stack and demonstrated architect-level work. We'll review proposals over the next 5-7 days.

title: **AI Image Generation Specialist Needed **
desc: **Overview** I'm looking for a skilled AI image generation specialist to create high-quality images based on reference photos and creative direction I will provide. This may start as a one-off project with the potential to develop into ongoing work depending on the results. **The Project** I am creating a children's book featuring woodland animals wearing clothes. The key to this project is a specific, realistic style — animals such as mice, squirrels, and other woodland creatures should look like **real, photorealistic animals** in **real-life natural settings**, with clothing added in a believable, detailed way. It can't look like AI and must be detailed and realistic and in proportion. **What You'll Be Doing** - Generating detailed, photorealistic images of woodland animals wearing clothes, based on reference images I supply - Matching style, mood, and composition from provided examples - Ensuring consistency across all images - Placing animals in real, natural woodland and outdoor settings - Iterating based on feedback until the output meets the brief - Delivering final images in high resolution, ready for print/publishing use **You'll Be a Great Fit If You:** - Have a strong portfolio of AI-generated work, ideally including animals or nature - Are experienced in prompt engineering and working from visual references - Can produce consistent photorealistic results across multiple images - Communicate clearly and turn around revisions quickly - Are comfortable using Photoshop or similar for any finishing touches **Project Details** - Budget: $50–$150 depending on scope - Timeline: To be discussed — ideally within 1–2 weeks - Number of images: around 17. **To Apply, Please Include:** - Examples of AI-generated work from your portfolio, especially any photorealistic animals or nature scenes - The tools and software you typically use (e.g. Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, DALL·E) - A brief note on your experience working from reference images Looking forward to working with a creative, detail-oriented freelancer who can bring this magical but realistic world to life!

title: Graphic Designer to Refine Premium Menswear Logo (Vector & Embroidery Ready)
desc: Project Description: I am launching Veylmont, a premium "quiet luxury" menswear brand based in Bengaluru. Our flagship product is a classic men's Oxford Cloth Button-Down (OCBD) shirt. I already have a clear conceptual direction for the logo, but I need an experienced technical graphic designer to refine, balance, and polish my concept into a flawless, factory-ready vector package. The Visual Concept: The branding consists of two distinct elements: 1. The Chest Emblem: An interlocking "VV" inside a subtle, minimalist shield. This will be flat-embroidered onto the left chest of the garments. 2. The Wordmark / Neck Tag: The word "VEYLMONT" in a timeless, elegant serif or geometric sans-serif font, accompanied by the sub-text "TIMELESS MEN" and "BENGALURU • EST. 2026". This layout will be used for high-density damask woven neck labels. Scope of Work & Deliverables: Vector Refinement: Trace and refine the "VV" shield concept into a clean, perfectly symmetrical vector design. Micro-Scale Optimization (Critical): The chest emblem must remain highly legible and distinct when scaled down to a maximum width of 0.85 inches. The linework must be drafted with sufficient negative space so the thread does not clump together or blur during the machine embroidery process. Neck Label Layout: Assemble the typography for the woven neck labels to fit a standard layout (2.5 inches wide x 1.5 inches high, end-fold format). Final File Handoff: Deliver all editable source files (.AI, .EPS), print-ready PDFs for the factory, and high-resolution PNGs with transparent backgrounds. The Ideal Freelancer: Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator. Understands the technical limitations and requirements of translating digital designs into physical apparel manufacturing (specifically small-scale embroidery and woven labels). Has a strong portfolio demonstrating minimalist, timeless, and sophisticated brand aesthetics. Screening Questions (Please answer when applying): 1. Have you previously designed or optimized logos specifically for small-scale garment embroidery? 2. If so, can you attach one or two examples of the digital file alongside the final embroidered outcome? 3. Based on the brief, what is your estimated timeline to deliver the initial refined concepts?

title: Business Intelligence Specialist — Sigma, ThoughtSpot & Omni

You will own end-to-end analytics delivery: from data modelling and semantic layer design to self-serve dashboard development and stakeholder enablement. Key responsibilities • Design and build production-grade dashboards and reports in Sigma, ThoughtSpot, and Omni. • Develop and maintain semantic/data models (workbooks, worksheets, topics, and Omni models). • Collaborate with data engineers to ensure performant underlying data layer in cloud warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Databricks, etc.). • Implement row-level security, access controls, and governance best practices. • Translate complex business requirements into scalable BI solutions. • Train and enable business users for self-serve analytics. • Document standards, model definitions, and dashboard guidelines. Required skills & experience • 4+ years of hands-on experience in business intelligence and analytics • Proven production deployments using at least two of: Sigma Computing, ThoughtSpot, or Omni • Strong SQL and data modelling skills (star/snowflake schemas, dimensional modelling) • Experience with a modern cloud data warehouse (Snowflake, BigQuery, or Databricks) • Ability to work independently, manage timelines, and communicate clearly in English Nice to have • Required Experience: Looker/LookML, dbt, and ThoughtSpot. • Preferred Experience: Sigma and REST API. • Data Transformation: Upstream data transformation using dbt. Expert Level Long-term / Ongoing Remote Part-time or Full-time India Negotiable / Hourly Attach CV to be considered.

title: Founder Associate | AI Operator | Executive Assistant
desc: Job Title Founder Associate | AI Operator | Business Operations Coordinator (Remote) About the Role I am looking for an exceptional Arabic-speaking professional to work directly with me as a long-term Founder Associate and AI Operator. This is not a traditional Virtual Assistant role. I am looking for someone who can become an extension of the founder, help organize multiple ventures, manage priorities, coordinate projects, conduct research, leverage AI tools extensively, and transform ideas into structured execution plans. The successful candidate will work across startups, business ventures, investment research activities, strategic initiatives, operational projects, government-related opportunities, and personal business initiatives. The ideal candidate enjoys solving problems, building systems, organizing complexity, and using AI to improve productivity and execution. Core Responsibilities Founder Support * Work directly with the founder on a daily basis. * Help organize priorities across multiple projects. * Track commitments, tasks, and deadlines. * Prepare executive summaries and decision briefs. * Convert voice notes, ideas, messages, and discussions into actionable plans. * Build systems that improve founder productivity. Project Management & Execution * Manage project trackers. * Follow up on action items. * Maintain execution plans. * Coordinate activities across multiple projects. * Monitor deadlines and milestones. * Identify blockers and recommend solutions. * Prepare weekly project status reports. AI Operations * Use Claude extensively. * Use ChatGPT extensively. * Create advanced prompts and workflows. * Generate reports, analyses, summaries, plans, SOPs, and documentation. * Build AI-assisted operating systems. * Organize AI-generated knowledge and outputs. * Improve workflows using AI tools. Business Research & Analysis * Research industries and markets. * Analyze business opportunities. * Conduct competitor analysis. * Research suppliers, partners, service providers, and technologies. * Prepare business research reports. * Assist with strategic planning. Investment Research Support * Monitor selected public companies. * Track earnings announcements. * Follow company developments. * Monitor business and economic news. * Maintain investment watchlists. * Prepare research summaries. * Build investment tracking spreadsheets. Important: This role does not involve making investment decisions or executing trades. The role is focused on research, organization, reporting, analysis, and operational support. Government Programs & Opportunities * Research government programs. * Track support initiatives. * Organize application requirements. * Follow deadlines and updates. * Assist with documentation and submissions. Documentation & Knowledge Management * Organize company documents. * Build knowledge bases. * Create SOPs and operational manuals. * Maintain records and documentation. * Build systems for storing and retrieving information. Meetings & Communication * Prepare agendas. * Take notes. * Prepare summaries. * Track action items. * Follow up on commitments. Required Skills * Native or near-native Arabic. * Strong written Arabic. * Good English communication skills. * Strong internet research abilities. * Strong analytical thinking. * Excellent organizational skills. * Strong follow-up capabilities. * High attention to detail. * Ability to work independently. Technical Skills * Claude * ChatGPT * Excel / Google Sheets * Google Workspace * Microsoft Office * Notion (preferred) * ClickUp / Asana / Monday (preferred) Preferred Backgrounds * Founder Associate * Chief of Staff * Startup Operations * Project Management * Business Analysis * Consulting * Strategy & Operations * Operations Management Who Should Not Apply * Traditional data entry assistants. * Candidates seeking highly repetitive work only. * Candidates with little interest in AI tools. * Candidates who require detailed instructions for every task. What Success Looks Like Within the first 90 days, the successful candidate should be able to: * Organize multiple projects into a structured operating system. * Maintain reliable project tracking. * Produce high-quality executive reports. * Build AI-assisted workflows. * Help reduce founder operational workload significantly. * Improve visibility across projects, priorities, and decisions. Application Requirements Please submit: 1. Resume/CV. 2. Portfolio or work samples. 3. Description of projects you have managed. 4. Description of how you use Claude and ChatGPT in your daily work. 5. Tools you are most comfortable using. 6. Availability and preferred working schedule. 7. A short introduction video explaining your background and why you are a good fit. Selection Process Shortlisted candidates will complete a practical assessment involving: * Organizing business information. * Structuring projects and tasks. * Creating executive summaries. * Demonstrating AI-assisted workflows. * Building a project tracking system. This role is intended to become a long-term partnership for the right candidate. AI Systems & Agent Development Responsibilities The candidate will be expected to actively use Claude, ChatGPT, and modern AI tools to build, operate, and improve AI-powered business systems. Responsibilities include: * Building and maintaining Claude Projects. * Creating and managing AI knowledge bases. * Designing AI agent workflows. * Creating prompt libraries and reusable AI frameworks. * Building business operating systems using AI. * Structuring business knowledge into organized AI-accessible formats. * Designing multi-agent workflows for business operations. * Supporting AI-powered reporting and decision-making systems. * Building and maintaining project-specific AI workspaces. * Using AI to accelerate research, documentation, planning, analysis, and execution. Preferred Experience: * Claude Projects * Claude Artifacts * ChatGPT Projects * AI Agents * Prompt Engineering * AI Operations * Knowledge Management Systems * Notion AI * Workflow Automation * Business Process Automation Candidates should provide examples of AI systems, workflows, agents, or knowledge bases they have personally built.

title: Social Media Content Editor for a Marketing Consultant's Personal Brand
desc: Social Media Content Editor for a Marketing Consultant's Personal Brand (Will review the applications 7 days after posting to ensure top candidates have a chance to apply.) INTRO I'm a freelance marketing leader for consumer brands helping early-stage ecommerce ventures in beauty, fashion, and consumer tech build their marketing from the ground up. Now I want to build my social presence with content that translates the big, complex world of marketing strategy into fun, entertaining social media content. I already have clarity about my expertise, niche and why my clients hire me. Now my goal is to become better known in my niche and get new clients, and I'm seeking a social media partner to design and produce content. THE VIBE Some personal brand accounts I like the tone and aesthetic of: • Caroline Winkler: youtube.com/@Caroline_Winkler • Grace Andrews: youtube.com/@graceandrewsss • How To Go Freelance: instagram.com/howtogofreelance • soph.work.baby: instagram.com/sophworkbaby • Grace Beverley: instagram.com/gracebeverley • Kate McAndrew: instagram.com/kate__mcandrew • Ashwin: instagram.com/shwinnabegobrand THE ROLE This is initially an 8-week commitment with scope to continue if it's a fit. You will be responsible for: • Read my personal brand goals, who my clients are, and why they hire me, so you understand the expertise we're translating. • Join a weekly call to ask questions and listen to me explain what I do for clients. Then find a fun way to turn that into content formats and post ideas. • Collaborate with me on the right hook and framing for each piece. • Brief me on how to shoot video: what to capture and how. Give me honest feedback when I shoot something poorly and tell me how to do it better. • Produce the finished content: edit short-form video and design carousels, three posts a week (typically 2 videos and 1 carousel), all in a LinkedIn-native style. • Direct the look: suggest fonts, colors, and design direction. • Be a strategic sounding board: read my LinkedIn drafts, tell me honestly when something isn't good enough, and check analytics to see what's working and what isn't. THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF… • You're on social media and LinkedIn constantly and love figuring out the algorithm • You enjoy creating a personal brand story • You're a great communicator who shows up to every meeting over-prepared • You're a strategic thinker who loves personal brand building • You have strong video editing and graphic design skills • You work with passion and urgency • A video with a bad hook makes you cringe • You're a real collaborator. I'm hiring for culture fit and shared energy over a perfect CV. BUDGET AND DELIVERABLES • You will be responsible for delivering 3 posts per week (typically 2 videos + 1 carousel) • Comp is $30-$40/hour depending on experience • Total budget will have a cap, around $850 USD per month Thank you - I look forward to hearing from you!

title: Instructional / Training Content Developer Build Course Modules (Content + Activities + Handouts)
desc: We are developing an 8 Module training program for organizational transformation on a technical topic (sustainability) We need an experienced instructional designer with strong visual design and PowerPoint skills to develop the full learning materials for each module, including the core training content, learner activities, and supporting handouts. Work will be delivered module by module so we can review and approve each one before moving to the next. This is a content development AND visual design role. We need someone who can take learning objectives and (often complex or technical) source material and turn it into clear, visually engaging, adult-learning-friendly material with polished, professional PowerPoint decks at the core, supported by other design tools where they elevate the result. Scope of Work 1. Training Content (PowerPoint-led) - Structured lesson content mapped to clear learning objectives - A polished, visually engaging PowerPoint deck(facilitator- and/or self-paced-ready) - Custom visuals - diagrams, infographics, process flows, data visualizations that simplify complex or technical concepts - Logical flow with intros, key concepts, examples, and summaries 2. Learner Activities - 2 activities per module (e.g. discussions, scenarios, case studies, quizzes, role-plays, group exercises) - Clear instructions, timing, and intended outcomes - Where relevant, gamified or interactive elements 3. Handouts & Aids - Participant worksheets, reference sheets, checklists, or templates - Clean, branded, print- and screen-ready formatting 4. Assessment / Knowledge Checks - Short quizzes or reflection prompts to confirm understanding We will provide source material / outlines / brand guidelines edit as applicable. You will be responsible for the instructional design and final polished materials. Working Approach (Module-by-Module) - We work in milestones — one module per milestone - For each module: draft → our review → revisions → approval → next module. - Each module should be self-contained but consistent in style, tone, and template with the others. - We expect [1–2] rounds of revisions per module included. - Deliverable Formats - Editable PowerPoint (PPTX) source files for all decks - Editable handout files (DOCX/PDF) where appropriate - Source/export files for any custom graphics created in other tools - All files using a consistent template/branding we agree on in Module 1 Required Skills & Experience - Advanced PowerPoint skills — you can build clean, modern, visually compelling decks (not bullet-heavy text dumps); strong command of layouts, animation, master slides, and templates - Visual design ability — comfortable using additional tools (e.g. Canva, Adobe Illustrator/Photoshop, Figma, infographic or diagramming tools) to create custom graphics, icons, and data visualizations - Proven experience developing training material for organizational transformation OR highly technical topics — you can take dense, complex, or change-heavy content and make it clear and engaging (please share relevant samples) - Proven instructional design / curriculum development experience - Strong understanding of adult learning principles (ADDIE, Bloom's, Kirkpatrick, or similar) - Excellent writing and content-structuring skills in English - Ability to design engaging activities and assessments — not just slides - Reliable, communicative, and able to work to milestone deadlines Nice to have: e-learning authoring tools (Articulate Storyline/Rise, Captivate), motion/animation skills, and experience translating technical SME input into learner-friendly content. How to Apply Please include in your proposal: 1. A short intro and why this project fits your experience. (NO AI PLEASE) 2. 2–3 samples of PowerPoint training materials you've developed ideally for organizational transformation or technical topics that show your visual design quality. 3. Your approach to developing one module (high-level process). 4. Your rate (per module) and estimated turnaround per module. We're looking for a long-term collaborator for the full build, so a strong first module could lead to all remaining modules.

desc: Graphic Designer Needed – Recreate & Prepare Wall Branding Artwork for Print I’m looking for an experienced graphic designer to recreate and refine an existing logo/vision wall design for our company headquarters. The concept has already been created and I will provide the reference artwork. Your role is to professionally rebuild it as a high-resolution, print-ready vector design suitable for large-format wall graphics. Please provide examples of: * Logo recreation work * Wall graphics * Signage or environmental branding projects This is a straightforward project for an experienced designer. I already have the concept and reference artwork; I simply need it recreated professionally and prepared to a high specification for production.

title: PowerPoint Presentation Designer Needed for Academic Medicine Leadership Interview
desc: I am preparing for an interview for a Department Chair position at a major academic medical center and medical school. I have already developed the content and created a basic 5 slide PowerPoint presentation. I am seeking a highly skilled presentation designer to transform the deck into a polished, executive-level presentation that reflects leadership, vision, professionalism, and academic credibility. Improve slide layouts, hierarchy, spacing, typography, and overall readability. Develop a neutral but impactful color palette that subtly aligns with the prospective employer's institutional branding. Design visual elements that highlight leadership accomplishments, strategic vision, clinical growth, research achievements, and departmental development. Incorporate professional icons, graphics, timelines, infographics, and visual callouts where appropriate. Create interactive PowerPoint elements such as clickable icons, expandable references, linked images, or pop-out features that can reveal supporting information during the presentation. Ensure the final presentation remains easily editable within PowerPoint. The ideal freelancer will possess: Strong PowerPoint design expertise with a portfolio of executive, consulting, healthcare, academic, or investor presentations. Experience creating presentations for senior leadership, C-suite executives, board meetings, strategy sessions, or academic institutions. Excellent visual storytelling skills. Strong graphic design and user interface (UI) design background. Ability to create sophisticated, modern visuals without excessive animation or gimmicks. Understanding of how to communicate complex information simply and effectively. Experience with healthcare, medical, academic, consulting, or higher-education presentations is highly preferred. Strong sense of color theory, typography, and visual hierarchy.

title: AI Meta Ad Creative Designer
desc: AI & Meta Ad Creative Designer I’m looking for a US-based creative designer to take over weekly ad creative production for my e-commerce brand. You’ll be using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, or similar) to produce high-quality static and motion ads for Meta campaigns. About the role: This is a fixed-price weekly retainer at $300/week for approximately two full days of work. I need someone reliable who can hit a consistent weekly turnaround and understands creative production for the hemp/supplement space. Weekly workflow: • Monday: I’ll send you the top-performing ads from the previous week so you can see what’s working and what direction to lean into. • Monday–Tuesday: You produce the new creatives and submit them for review. • Tuesday by 12 PM PST: Any revisions or fixes are due, so creatives are ready to post Wednesday morning. title: Growth and Partnerships Co-Ordinator (Ecom Fitness Brand)
desc: # Growth & Community Coordinator (Ecommerce Fitness Brand) ## About Us LWLSS is a performance-focused ecommerce brand serving CrossFit and functional fitness athletes worldwide. We're building a lean, systems-driven business and are looking for a highly organised Growth & Community Coordinator to help expand our reach through gym partnerships, creator relationships, community engagement and content coordination. This is a long-term freelance position. We are NOT looking for agencies. We are NOT looking for social media managers. We are looking for one highly capable freelancer who enjoys building relationships, managing projects and helping a brand grow. --- ## Your Mission Help grow the LWLSS brand through: * Gym outreach * Creator outreach * Community management * Content coordination * Partnership development Your goal is simple: Generate attention, engagement and partnership opportunities without relying entirely on paid ads. --- ## Responsibilities ### Gym Partnership Outreach * Research CrossFit and functional fitness gyms * Build and maintain outreach database * Contact gyms via email, Instagram and website forms * Follow up consistently * Send partnership information * Coordinate poster distribution (digital and physical) * Track responses and partnership status --- ### Creator Outreach * Identify relevant creators and athletes * Contact creators * Manage follow-ups * Coordinate product gifting * Track creator relationships * Collect content and testimonials --- ### Community Management * Support our LWLSS Training Club * Drive engagement within our Facebook community * Encourage member participation * Promote challenges and member wins * Stimulate discussion and user-generated content --- ### Content Coordination You will NOT create content. You will coordinate content. Responsibilities include: * Managing content calendar * Organising creator submissions * Collecting assets * Coordinating with video editors and designers * Ensuring deadlines are met --- ### Partnership Tracking Maintain organised records of: * Gym partners * Creator partners * Outreach activity * Follow-up schedules * Partnership performance --- ## Requirements ### Must Have * Excellent written English * Strong organisation skills * Strong communication skills * Ability to work independently * Experience using Google Sheets * Experience managing projects and follow-ups --- ### Bonus * Experience in ecommerce * Experience in fitness or CrossFit * Experience with creator outreach * Experience managing online communities --- ## Important This role is NOT: * customer support * bookkeeping * data entry * social media posting * graphic design * video editing Your role is growth, coordination and relationship building. --- ## Success Metrics Success will be measured by: * New gyms contacted * Gym partnerships activated * Creator relationships established * Community engagement growth * User-generated content collected * Consistency of follow-up and execution --- ## Engagement Structure * Long-term freelance role * Approximately 5–10 hours per week initially * Potential to grow over time * Flexible working hours --- ## To Apply Please answer: 1. Why does this role interest you? 2. Have you worked with ecommerce brands before? 3. Have you done outreach or partnership development before? 4. Have you managed communities or creator relationships? 5. Confirm you are an individual freelancer and not an agency. 6. What is your hourly rate? Applications that do not answer these questions will not be considered.

title: 3D animation graphics to show textile design
desc: # 3D Product Video Designer Needed for Premium Bedding / Soft Goods Brand We are looking for an experienced 3D product designer / animator to create premium, conversion-focused video assets for an ecommerce bedding and soft goods brand. The products are in the premium bedding category and are designed to communicate softness, comfort, loft, quality, and a hotel-style sleep experience. At the moment, our existing assets mostly show the finished products styled beautifully in lifestyle settings. These images are strong from a visual and brand perspective, but they do not fully explain what makes the products special from a construction and materials point of view. We are looking to create short 3D product videos that reveal the hidden product story: how the products are made, how the inner fill behaves, how the layers or construction work together, and why the finished product feels soft, supportive, and premium. The goal is to create visual assets that help customers better understand what they are buying and feel more confident purchasing online. ## What we need We would like to develop short 3D video assets for use across: * Ecommerce product pages * Paid social ads * Website landing pages * Email marketing * Short-form social placements The videos should feel premium, clean, soft, modern, tactile, and persuasive. They should help translate product quality and construction into a simple visual story that customers can understand quickly. Possible creative concepts include: * 3D product cutaways showing internal construction * Animated layers showing how the product is built * Close-up fibre or fill animation showing softness, loft, and airiness * Exploded-view product animation * Product rotation or hero render animation * Short looping animations for product pages * Short ad-style videos that combine technical detail with emotional comfort We are not looking for anything overly clinical, industrial, or scientific. The final result should still feel warm, premium, inviting, and aligned with a lifestyle/homewares brand. ## Product types The project relates to a small collection of soft bedding products. Further detail will be shared privately with shortlisted candidates. There may be an opportunity to create assets for multiple product types, but we are open to starting with one pilot video first and then expanding the visual system across the rest of the range. ## Assets we can provide Once the freelancer is shortlisted, we can provide: * Product photography * Existing product videos * Brand imagery * Product descriptions * Product specifications * Notes on materials, construction, and manufacturing * Visual references for the type of product storytelling we like ## Deliverables We would like your recommendation on the best deliverable structure. Possible deliverables may include: * One 15–30 second hero 3D product animation * Short 5–10 second cutdowns for ads and product pages * Vertical, square, and landscape versions * Still renders from the 3D animation * Looping product-page animations * Final files optimised for web, ecommerce, and paid social Please include in your proposal what you recommend based on your experience. ## Ideal candidate We are looking for someone with experience in: * 3D product animation * Product cutaways or exploded-view animations * Soft goods, textiles, bedding, furniture, beauty, wellness, or premium consumer products * Creating assets for ecommerce and paid social * Turning technical product features into beautiful, easy-to-understand visual stories A strong eye for fabric, softness, texture, lighting, movement, and premium product presentation is important. ## Creative direction The goal is to make the invisible qualities of the product visible. We want customers to understand: * Why the product feels soft and comfortable * How the inner construction contributes to comfort * How layers, fill, or fabrication create a premium feel * What makes the product different from standard alternatives * Why the product is worth buying online without touching it first The visual style should sit somewhere between technical product education and beautiful lifestyle storytelling. ## To apply Please include: 1. Examples of relevant 3D product animation work. 2. Any examples of product cutaways, exploded views, soft goods, textiles, fabric, bedding, furniture, beauty, wellness, or premium ecommerce work. 3. A short explanation of how you would approach this type of project. 4. Your recommendation on whether to begin with one hero animation or multiple product-specific assets. 5. Your estimated timeline. 6. Your estimated pricing or suggested project structure. Further product and brand details will be shared privately with shortlisted candidates.

title: Senior UX/UI Product Designer for Web App Audits and Mockups
desc: Job Summary / Duties I’m looking for an expert-level UX/UI product designer with excellent judgment, strong web app design instincts, and an unusually good aesthetic sense. The ideal person can quickly understand an existing web application by reviewing both the live URL and the GitHub repository, then produce clear, actionable recommendations for improving the interface, user experience, visual hierarchy, usability, information architecture, and overall polish. This role is not just about making things “look nicer.” I want someone who can think like a senior product designer: identify friction points, simplify workflows, improve clarity, spot inconsistencies, propose better interaction patterns, and explain the reasoning behind each recommendation. The work will typically involve: * Reviewing an existing web app through the live URL and GitHub repo * Auditing the current UX/UI against modern web app best practices * Producing clear markdown files that document proposed changes, rationale, priorities, and implementation notes * Creating visual mockups, ideally interactive prototypes, that show the recommended improvements * Using tools like Figma/Adobe CC/whatever-you-prefer, GitHub, Codex, Claude Code / Claude-based coding workflows, or similar AI-assisted development tools to inspect the app and develop recommendations * Suggesting practical changes that a developer can actually implement * Prioritizing improvements by impact, effort, and user value * Noticing subtle design issues around spacing, typography, layout, affordances, responsiveness, accessibility, and interaction design * Helping turn rough functional web apps into clean, intuitive, polished, professional products I am happy to pay more for the right person. I care much more about expertise, speed, taste, and quality of output than finding the lowest rate. A great fit would be someone who can accomplish a lot in a focused hour and produce thoughtful, usable deliverables without needing heavy direction. Please include examples of web apps, dashboards, admin tools, SaaS products, or internal tools you have improved. Bonus points if you can show before/after UX work, product audits, Figma prototypes, GitHub-based workflows, or examples of markdown-based design specs you have created for developers.

title: Brand Identity Designer — Logo and Style Kit for Business Program
desc: The Three-Hour BD Week — Logo and Brand Identity Project Overview I need a freelance brand designer to create a logo and brand identity kit for a business program called **The Three-Hour BD Week**. This is a standalone brand (not connected to my consulting firm, Bartlett Strategies) with its own domain.
